calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court required an appearance by defendant Rose Dayrit so defendant could trace the levied funds to an exempt source. There being no appearances, the Court denies the claim of exemption of defendant Rose Dayrit. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.
